center.name: Petr Sushkin
center.summary: Petr Sushkin是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Mongolian gull，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | status = NE | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Larus | species = mongolicus | authority = Sushkin, 1925 | synonyms = *Larus argentatus mongolicus *Larus vegae mongolicus *Larus cachinnans mongolicus |synonyms_ref = }} thumb|left|Adult Mongolian gulls swimming on Lake Baikal The Mongolian gull (Larus mongolicus) is a large gull in the large white-headed gull (Larus) complex which breeds in interior eastern Asia
